[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0011000 2
2 0111110 5
3 0101110 4
4 1101001 4
5 0011000 2
6 0010100 2
7 0100000 1

01 10 0001000 1
12 21 0010000 1
23 32 0000000 a match 0
34 43 0000000 a match 0
45 54 0010000 1
56 65 0000110 2
67 76 0101110 4 match 3
70 07 0001001 2

02 20 0000000 a match 0
13 31 0100000 1 match 7
24 42 0010000 1
35 53 0000000 a match 0
46 64 0001000 1
57 75 0000110 2
60 06 0001000 1
71 17 0101010 3

03 30 0000001 1
14 41 0011000 2 match 1 5
25 52 0010100 2 match 6
36 63 0100000 1 match 7
47 74 0001000 1
50 05 0000000 a match 0
61 16 0101010 3
72 27 0000100 1

04 40 0001000 1
15 51 0010010 2
26 62 0000100 1
37 73 1100001 3
